verses.1: It is a good thing to give thanks to the LORD,
verses.2: to proclaim your loving kindness in the morning,
verses.3: with the ten-stringed lute, with the harp,
verses.4: For you, LORD, have made me glad through your work.
verses.5: How great are your works, LORD!
verses.7: though the wicked spring up as the grass,
verses.8: But you, LORD, are on high forever more.
verses.10: But you have exalted my horn like that of the wild ox.
verses.11: My eye has also seen my enemies.
verses.12: The righteous shall flourish like the palm tree.
verses.13: They are planted in the LORD’s house.
verses.14: They will still produce fruit in old age.
verses.15: to show that the LORD is upright.
